content: Click Open <1>{{organizationName}} Desktop</1> in the browser dialog to work with the encrypted documents.

comment.text: This translation key is used for a button label that displays instructions on how to open an encrypted document from the browser dialog. It appears in the Private Rooms Page and should be translated to facilitate understanding of this feature.

usage.context:
</Text>
 
 <Text as="div" textAlign="center" fontSize="20px" fontWeight={300}>
 <Trans
 t={t}
 i18nKey="PrivacyClick"
 ns="PrivacyPage"
 values={{
 organizationName: logoText,
 }}
 components={{

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The German translation adds the word 'Editoren' (Editors) which is not present in the English source, changing the name of the application/action being referred to.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Klicken Sie auf <1>{{organizationName}} Desktop</1> öffnen in der Dialogbox, um mit verschlüsselten Dokumenten zu arbeiten.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: English ends with "." but translation ends with "s"

The word 'Desktop' is translated as 'Սեղան' (Table/Desk), which is a literal translation error in this context. In software UI, 'Desktop' refers to the desktop application/environment, not a physical piece of furniture.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Սեղմեք <1>{{organizationName}} Desktop</1> բրաուզերի դիալոգում՝ գաղտնագրված փաստաթղթերի հետ աշխատելու համար:

ai_spell_check_issues.description: English ends with "." but translation ends with "s"
The Russian translation adds the word 'Editors' inside the tag, which is not present in the English source text.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Нажмите Открыть <1>{{organizationName}} Desktop</1> в диалоговом окне браузера для работы с зашифрованными документами.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation adds the word 'Editors' inside the tag, which is not present in the source English text.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Кликните на Отвори <1>{{organizationName}} Desktop</1> у дијалогу прегледача да бисте радили са шифрованим документима.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation 'настільні редактори' (desktop editors) is a mistranslation of 'Desktop' in the context of 'Desktop App/Desktop version'. It changes the meaning from a specific application/environment to a general tool type.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Клацніть "Відкрити <1>{{organizationName}} Desktop</1>" у діалоговому вікні браузера для роботи з зашифрованими документами.
